overall_summary: Mapping correctly applies the Rule 9 reconciliation exception by including discovery tools (1.3, 1.5) as coverage rather than prerequisites. Rationales are specific and compliant with Rule 15 mechanism class distinctions (excluding log-based 1.4). No critical false negatives identified; 1.1 correctly excluded as a prerequisite artifact.

per_mapping_verdicts.judge_note: Rationale correctly links unauthorized asset remediation (1.2) to the assignment of owners for non-inventoried devices (AM-03).
Correctly identified as coverage under Rule 9 reconciliation exception (Change 1). Provides the active scan input required for reconciliation.
Correctly identified as equivalent mechanism class (passive discovery) under Rule 15. Valid coverage under Rule 9 reconciliation exception.
